title: Haya Home 500 75L Black Plastic Bin Bags Heavy Duty Bin Liners, Refuse Sacks Pack of 50 x 10 Heavy Duty Waste Dustbin Bags roll for Kitchen Home Office DIY Garden Made from 100% Recycled Material
features: ✅ Size, Dimensions and Capacity : Haya Home black bags heavy duty are 30 microns Large size with 500 bin bags on a roll with Rim size of 725 mm x 840 mm (Rim opening size1450 mm or 145 cm). These garbage bin bag can be used on your bin to collect rubbish waste of 50l 60l & up to 75l. These bin bags can lift garbage rubbish waste up to 20 Kg without failing & tearing. Please measure your bin before buying this product.

♻️ RECYCLED WASTE: Haya Home heavy duty bin bags are British Made thick and strong black bin liners which are also heavy duty Refuse Sacks & waste bin liner. These bin bags are environmentally friendly as they are made from 100% low Density Polyethylene recycling (LDPE) plastic material. Love your Environment! Suitable for kitchen swing bin liners, industrial, home, office, work and garden waste rubbish & garbage.

💪 STRONG AND ROBUST: During the manufacturing of bin liner an extrusion layering is added to give a tensile strength which makes our bin bags very strong and robust allow you to hold 0 Kg of waste without failing.

💧 LEAK PROOF: The stretch, puncture & lift test showed that it can take up to 20 Kg of weight without failing and tearing. Also, seal / Leak proof test showed no leakage and hence, are leak proof which in return every time leave your trash bin clean and smell free.

🏴󠁣󠁦󠁵󠁫󠁿British Made: From 100% superior high tech recycled tear resistance and low density polyethylene material, helping to reduce carbon footprint, and making UK greener. Our products are manufactured in the United Kingdom with a stringent quality checks in place.

🤝Commitment: Our focus is on providing the green packaging solution and to reduce the impact on our planet by helping to reduce the carbon footprint. Our customer is important to us if you are not happy with our product please follow amazon product return policy.
description: Performance is not all about the colour and thickness of the bags but resistance against force. British Made bin bag have achieved this by using 100% recycled plastic material (not heavy material such as chalk/calcium) which add stretch and improve tensile strength to our black bin bags. This allow our bin liner to lift up to 20 Kg of waste material per bin bag without tearing. Why Choose Haya Home bin bags: ✅Haya Home, heavy duty refuse bin liners are British made and are produce with 100% recycled material. ✅SIZE & VARIATIONS FOR BIN LINER: Each heavy duty bin bags roll contains approx 50 recycled plastic black bin bags which are 725 x 840 cm in size. There are 50 'Black Bin Liners' per roll and you will get 50 x 10 black bin bag roll in total 500 bin bags. These are also available in different quantities. ✅Each refuse sack can hold up to approx 75 liters of waste.. These are ideal to use for kitchen, Garden Garbage Trash Rubbish or industrial waste. ✅Unlike the light duty bin liner, British Made heavy duty black bin bags are made with recycled LDPE. ✅These heavy duty refuse sacks are not weak and therefore, cannot be easily tear and leak which keeps your bin clean and trouble free. ✅Use for everyday household. No more finger popping through the bag. ⚠️Warnings: To avoid danger of suffocation, keep these bags away from babies and children. These bags are not suitable for rubble waste. Not design for sharp objects.
